name: Crackdown
blurb: A regulator found the refresh button and now audits your front page like a cop with a grudge and no hobbies.
summary: Audit chance ×2 · heat cooling reduced to 35%

name: Gold Rush
blurb: Every gambling goblin swears the machine is hot. The maths is bullshit; the revenue is gorgeous.

name: Drama Week
blurb: Everyone has receipts, nobody has context, and the clip vultures are working their arses off for free.

name: Sponsor War
blurb: The brands doubled the cheque and halved their fucking patience. Keep every needy little logo smiling.

name: Slow News Day
blurb: The internet is outside touching grass like a pack of traitors. Finance lowered the target and called it strategy.
